reviews.comment:
Estacion muy bien ubicada. El servicio genial. Los chicos del Box una velocidad increíble para atenderte. Parecen de la formula 1. Deberían ir gente, 100 porciento recomendables

(Translated by Google)
Very well-located station. Great service. The guys at the counter are incredibly quick to serve you. They look like they're from Formula 1. You should go, everyone. 100 percent recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPc2FtNHNnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención, poco personal. Precios muy caros en kiosco,faltante de cigarrillos siempre un desastre" y comida preparada ahí como hamburguesas, etc.es recalentado,pan duro listo para hacer pan rayado,la hamburguesas solo con lupa la podía ver y el queso frío... cobran $800...una estafa

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, understaffed. Very expensive prices at the kiosk, always out of cigarettes, a complete mess. And the food prepared there, like hamburgers, etc., is reheated, the bread is stale and ready to be used for breadcrumbs, you could only see the hamburgers with a magnifying glass, and the cheese was cold... they charge $800... a rip-off
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPa1lpdEN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Habremos entrado alrededor de las 2 am con un grupo de amigos, muy buena música, hubo show de los palmae, misma producción que los palmeras! Suenan de 10!

(Translated by Google)
We arrived around 2 a.m. with a group of friends. The music was great. There was a Palmae performance, the same production as the Palmeras! They sound amazing!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPbUp1TTV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Trato siempre de cargar nafta en esta sucursal dado que es de fácil acceso y en horarios particulares es rápido. En horas muy transitadas la evito porque hay que hacer cola aveces.
La atención de los empleados impecable, siempre muy amables.

(Translated by Google)
I always try to fill up at this station because it's easily accessible and quick during off-peak hours. I avoid it during busy times because there's often a line.
The staff is incredibly helpful and always very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPc0tPQlBREAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, lo único malo dentro de lo bueno que tienen es que si querés retirar efectivo nunca tienen, se entiende por los medios de pagos electrónicos, pero sería un punto a favor.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, the only downside amidst all the good things they have is that if you want to withdraw cash they never have any, which is understandable given the electronic payment methods, but it would be a point in their favor.
